author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: CodeQL alert 27: js/polynomial-redos in sdk/test/linked-command-detection.ts trailing-dash prefix trim

GitHub code scanning (CodeQL) alert #27 (created 2026-07-16, open): extractReferencedPmItemIdsFromCommand normalizes the workspace id prefix with idPrefix.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/-+$/, "") at src/sdk/test/linked-command-detection.ts:318. The /-+$/ pattern backtracks polynomially on adversarial prefixes consisting of long dash runs that fail to anchor at end-of-string. The prefix flows from workspace settings (id_prefix), so a hostile tracker config or crafted settings file can degrade linked-test governance scans. Duplicate check: Semgrep items (pm-t8e9 lineage) cover non-literal RegExp construction in the old src/cli/commands paths, a different rule and site; no existing item tracks CodeQL alert 27.

The trailing-dash trim runs in linear time (index scan or equivalent, no ambiguous quantifier before an end anchor); CodeQL alert 27 closes on the default branch after merge; a regression test exercises a pathological dash-run prefix and asserts fast, correct normalization; behavior for normal prefixes is unchanged

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Fix evidence 2026-07-17: replaced idPrefix.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/-+$/, "") with a linear index scan trimming trailing dashes in extractReferencedPmItemIdsFromCommand (src/sdk/test/linked-command-detection.ts). Regression spec covers canonical "PM--" trimming, all-dash prefixes rejecting every id, a benign 64-dash decorated prefix still matching, and the pathological 50k-dash-run-plus-tail prefix that previously backtracked quadratically (pre-fix the assertion could not complete inside the suite timeout). Also extended the deps value-bearing flag set with --direction/--kind so linked-command item-reference parsing stays correct for the new flags. Alert 27 closure on the default branch to be verified after merge.
